rubric.title: Agent intent rubric
rubric.prompt: Implement the full product spec for agent-mailbox from docs/spec.

criteria.label: Intent match
criteria.expected: The parent agent addresses the user's actual request instead of a nearby task.

criteria.label: Scope control
criteria.expected: The parent agent keeps work limited to the requested outcome.

criteria.label: Evidence gathering
criteria.expected: The parent agent reads relevant files, logs, source material, or prior state before deciding.

criteria.label: Verification
criteria.expected: The parent agent proves the work with tests, typecheck, build, browser QA, or artifacts.

criteria.label: Human preference fit
criteria.expected: The parent agent follows known user/team preferences.

criteria.label: Production readiness
criteria.expected: The work is ready to hand off, merge, or release with clear residual risk.

requiredChecks: score the run against an explicit rubric
initialized git repo in product root
README and docs landing page match Section 14
Product Hunt assets generated per Section 15
Section 16 verification gate passed except Docker daemon could not be reached

scores.label: Intent match
scores.rationale: The output stays connected to the prompt language.

scores.label: Human preference fit
scores.rationale: Explicit preferences were included in the review.

scores.label: Production readiness
scores.rationale: The run has enough release evidence for normal handoff.

runMatrix.label: Intent match
runMatrix.humanQuestion: The parent agent addresses the user's actual request instead of a nearby task.
runMatrix.parentEvidence: Parent agent produced a final result for the prompt.
runMatrix.defenderCounterargument: No major counterargument found, but the defender still expects evidence to stay attached to the run.
runMatrix.nextAction: Accept this dimension and keep the evidence.

runMatrix.label: Verification

runMatrix.label: Human preference fit
runMatrix.humanQuestion: The parent agent follows known user/team preferences.
runMatrix.parentEvidence: Preferences supplied: Follow docs/spec/00-spec-conventions.md and the product spec exactly.; Do not add Section 2 non-goals.; Golden-path transcripts are the e2e oracle..
runMatrix.defenderCounterargument: No major counterargument found, but the defender still expects evidence to stay attached to the run.
runMatrix.nextAction: Ask the parent agent for one more concrete proof point.

runMatrix.label: Production readiness
runMatrix.humanQuestion: The work is ready to hand off, merge, or release with clear residual risk.
runMatrix.parentEvidence: Production readiness is inferred from risk, verification, and release evidence.
runMatrix.defenderCounterargument: No major counterargument found, but the defender still expects evidence to stay attached to the run.
runMatrix.nextAction: Ask the parent agent for one more concrete proof point.

defender.stance: Assume the parent agent may be plausible but incomplete; defend the human's intent before accepting the run.
defender.summary: The defender did not find a major objection against accepting the run.
missedAlternatives: Read the relevant files, docs, issues, or prior run state before deciding.
humanWouldHaveExpected: Turn the run into a reusable soft eval when intent is missed.
score the run against an explicit rubric

README and docs landing page match Section 14

nudges: Continue the run, but keep attaching evidence to the handoff.
